name: The Snake-Oil Salesman
text: Whenever The Snake-Oil Salesman attacks, you may make an offer to the defending player out loud: name a thing you'll do for them (gain them life, give them a Treasure) if they don't block. If they accept and don't block, do half of it and 'forget' the rest. If they block, the tonic 'cures' them — destroy a Treasure they own.
flavorText: "Cures gout, warts, indecision, AND lycanthropy. Mostly water. Some lycanthropy."

extras.fourthWall: make a verbal deal with the defending player
